ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a favorite and a definitive classic. Mentioned multiple times for its perfect blend of horror and practical effects, and its status as a re-watchable masterpiece.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended as a modern classic that will stand the test of time. Praised for its intense psychological horror and impactful storytelling.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Described as infinitely re-watchable and a masterclass in slow-burn horror. Noted for its dread-inducing atmosphere and lack of reliance on common horror tropes.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a top-choice favorite horror film, celebrated for its perfect fusion of sci-fi and horror and its iconic status.

ranked_movies.title: The Witch
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a modern classic. Appreciated for its atmospheric dread, historical setting, and unique old English dialogue. Also mentioned as a 'comfort horror' movie.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a film that will become a classic. Praised for its unique premise and effective, relentless sense of dread, with one user calling it a '2 hour psychological panic attack' in theaters.

ranked_movies.title: Poltergeist
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the context of Harry Potter's horror elements and directly listed as a favorite classic for its exploration of childhood fears and memorable scenes.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: The 2002 American remake was the subject of its own discussion thread, where it was passionately defended as one of the greatest horror movies ever made, praised for its dreary atmosphere and sense of doom.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite comfort horror movie and credited with getting many into the horror genre. Recognized for its meta-commentary and lasting impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Named as a top-choice favorite, with users noting its ability to scare audiences decades after its release, solidifying its status as a timeless classic.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended in the comedy-horror thread. Celebrated for its clever, meta deconstruction of horror tropes.

ranked_movies.title: Return of the Living Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as the 'gold standard' of comedy-horror. Praised for perfectly balancing laughs and scares, and for its iconic lines and punk aesthetic.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite horror movie, with a noted cult following and lingering intrigue around its lost footage.

ranked_movies.title: Smile
ranked_movies.reason: The sequel, 'Smile 2', was passionately recommended as an extremely effective and overlooked modern horror film, with specific scenes highlighted as masterful.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: The catalyst for the comedy-horror request thread. Loved for its subversion of hillbilly horror tropes and its hilarious, gory charm.

ranked_movies.title: The Void
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a personal pick for a future classic, praised for its practical effects and lovecraftian atmosphere.

ranked_movies.title: Mandy
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a personal favorite with classic potential. Noted for its surreal, psychedelic, and violent style.

ranked_movies.title: Get Out
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned alongside Hereditary and The Witch as a modern film that is sure to achieve classic status for its social commentary and horror.

ranked_movies.title: Thirteen Ghosts
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a beloved 'bad' horror movie from the early 2000s that is fun and has awesome, creative set design.

ranked_movies.title: House on Haunted Hill
ranked_movies.reason: The 1999 remake was listed as a favorite 'objectively bad' movie that is still enjoyed, and also mentioned as a comfort horror film for its nostalgic value.
